texto: In this modern day, when only what we see is allowed to have certainity, and when scientific data seems to hold the trump card for truth, when only what can be measured exists, love defies all these strictures and dances joyfully before the eyes of human beings, teasing them with the promise of the unknown.
explicacao: Citação de Shelina Zahra Janmohamed sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “In this modern day, when only what we see is allowed to have certainity, and when scientific data…” articula reflexao, love, mystery em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mystery e science.
